/CAL: APD 1203,9PC  MOTION TO TRANSFER PROBATION FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTYOF ALAMEDA COUNTY/MO GRTD/CTORD: PROBATION IS TRANSFERRED FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY OF ALAMEDA COUNTY/X:COURT ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/

/CAL:SENTENCING/X:DEFENDANTS SENTENCING MEMORANDUM FILED/AJW/CH1:SP 5Y:U:ESS:PROB 5Y:PJ 272D/CTS:272/X:AS TO COUNTS 2, 3, 4, AND 11, THE DEFENDANTIS SENTENCED TO 8 MONTHS STATE PRISON, ONE-THIRD OF THE MIDTERM, CONSECUTIVE TO COUNT 1, EXECUTION OF SENTENCE SUSPENDED/X:AS TO COUNTS 2,3, 4,&,11 THE COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE IS 272 DAYS, WITH CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED OF 272 DAYS, THE DEFENDANT IS ALSO SENTENCED TO 5 YEARS OF PROBATION ON EACH OF THESECOUNTS/X:AS TO COUNT 6, THE DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED TO IMPOSITION OF SENTENCED SUSPENDED, FIVE YEARS PROBATION AND 10 MONTHS IN THE COUNTY JAIL WITHCREDIT FOR TIME SERVED OF 272 DAYS/X:AS TO COUNT 10, THE DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED TO IMPOSITION OF SENTENCED SUSPENDED, FIVE YEARS PROBATION AND 6 MONTHS IN THE COUNTY JAIL WITH CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED OF 272 DAYS/CCC1:COUNTS1,2,3,4,6,10,11/DNACOMP/STATES/IND/WS/DTC/RX/WEAP/X:CONFISCATED AND DESTROY WEAPONS SEIZED/X:COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION ON RESTITUTION/X:AS A CONDITION OF PROBATION, 1 YEAR OF RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM AND ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY APD, WHEN PROGRAM IS COMPLETED, TO COMPLETE HIGH SCHOOL DIPLOMA THROUGH 5KEYS CHARTER SCHOOL AND SEEK AND MAINTAIN FULL TIME EMPLOYMENT, COUNSELINGAS DETERMINED BY APD, PROOF OF EMPLOYMENT TO BE SUBMITTED EACH MONTH/SAORD/SA1:150 YARDS ANNEMARIE RUTH MCGOVERN, 19, F;LEONG APARICO MING, 19 YO, F/VF4:300/VF2:150/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/ /COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/COMUN 400/
